narrative:
Green Twp township has 7,733 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.0 percentage points.
